---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for ArchiveOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why This Matters

Explain expected impact on reliability, usability, or observability.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered.

## Scope and Risks

- Affected modules:
- Risk to integrity/provenance invariants:
- Migration or compatibility concerns:

## Evidence

Include import evidence, logs, reports, or user workflows motivating this change.

## Definition of Done

Describe measurable acceptance criteria.
